name: romelo | ♡‧₊˚chasin’
description:
and i was like: “why are you so obsessed with me?”˚ʚ♡ɞ˚

#chasin’

────୨ৎ────

⤷ ゛❝you were curled into him, your legs tangled with his, the cheap box fan humming in the corner. the movie flickered across the room—some action shit he wasn’t paying attention to. romelo had one hand under your shirt, just resting warm on your waist, thumb stroking absent circles like he didn’t even realize he was doing it.

you on the other hand, were locked into the movie, eyes glued to the screen, barely blinking. romelo swore you hadn’t moved in twenty minutes.

he couldn’t sit still to save his life.

he slid closer behind you, chest pressed to your back, his arm curling around your waist. his lips found your neck like they belonged there—soft at first, then slower, warmer, lingering just a second longer each time.

you didn’t flinch. didn’t shoo him off. didn’t even pause the movie. he smiled against your skin. “damn, you really tryna watch this,” he murmured, voice low but amused.❞ˎˊ˗
